personalLess30: A photo of a young pedestrian who appears to be under 30 years old.
personalLess45: A photo of a pedestrian who appears to be between 30 and 45 years old.
personalLess60: A photo of a pedestrian who appears to be middle-aged, between 45 and 60 years old.
personalLarger60: A photo of an elderly pedestrian who appears to be over 60 years old.
carryingBackpack: A photo of a pedestrian wearing or carrying a backpack on their back.
carryingOther: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an object or bag that is not a backpack or handbag.
lowerBodyCasual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual lower body clothing like jeans or leggings.
upperBodyCasual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual upper body clothing like a t-shirt or hoodie.
lowerBodyFormal: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal lower body clothing like dress slacks or a suit skirt.
upperBodyFormal: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal upper body clothing like a blazer, suit jacket, or dress shirt.
accessoryHat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a hat, cap, or head covering.
upperBodyJacket: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a jacket or coat over their clothes.
lowerBodyJeans: A photo of a pedestrian wearing denim jeans.
footwearLeatherShoes: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal or semi-formal leather shoes.
upperBodyLogo: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a top with a visible logo, text, or graphic.
hairLong: A photo of a pedestrian with long hair reaching past their shoulders.
personalMale: A photo of a male pedestrian.
carryingMessengerBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a messenger bag or satchel across their body.
accessoryMuffler: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a muffler or scarf around their neck.
accessoryNothing: A photo of a pedestrian who is not wearing any visible accessories like hats, glasses, or scarves.
carryingNothing: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any bags or objects.
upperBodyPlaid: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a top with a plaid, checkered, or tartan pattern.
carryingPlasticBags: A photo of a pedestrian carrying plastic shopping bags.
footwearSandals: A photo of a pedestrian wearing sandals or open-toed footwear.
footwearShoes: A photo of a pedestrian wearing standard shoes, excluding boots or sandals.
lowerBodyShorts: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shorts.
upperBodyShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short-sleeved top or shirt.
lowerBodyShortSkirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short skirt.
footwearSneaker: A photo of a pedestrian wearing athletic sneakers or gym shoes.
upperBodyThinStripes: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a top with a pattern of thin stripes.
accessorySunglasses: A photo of a pedestrian wearing sunglasses over their eyes.
lowerBodyTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing full-length trousers or pants.
upperBodyTshirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a t-shirt.
upperBodyOther: A photo of a pedestrian wearing an uncommon or miscellaneous type of upper body garment.
upperBodyVNeck: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a top with a V-neck collar.
